Memory.title: Wedding Memory
Memory.description: A photo or video uploaded by a guest during the wedding.

url.description: Base64 or Cloud Storage URL of the photo or video

GuestbookMessage.title: Guestbook Message
GuestbookMessage.description: A heartfelt text or audio note left by a wedding guest.

voiceUrl.description: Optional base64 recording data string for voice notes

/memories/{memoryId}.description: A high-fidelity photo or video uploaded for the wedding gallery, grouped under sections.

/guestbook/{messageId}.description: A guestbook wish combined with optional recordable vocals.
